overridableConfigKeys.label: Bodies
overridableConfigKeys.description: 16 balls dropped from the top center; the widening horizontal spread at the floor forms the bell curve.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Floor
overridableConfigKeys.description: Y pixel at which a ball has landed; at or below it the ball freezes and the pile persists.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gravity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Downward acceleration added to each falling ball's vy every tick (y grows downward).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Jitter
overridableConfigKeys.description: Half-width of the per-tick random horizontal kick in pixels; the peg deflections that build the spread.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the drop.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Shapes
overridableConfigKeys.description: Triangular grid of 15 static peg markers the balls deflect around as they fall.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds the horizontal walk.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-probability / GaltonBoardOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

bodies.description: 16 balls dropped from the top center; the widening horizontal spread at the floor forms the bell curve.

floor.description: Y pixel at which a ball has landed; at or below it the ball freezes and the pile persists.

gravity.description: Downward acceleration added to each falling ball's vy every tick (y grows downward).

jitter.description: Half-width of the per-tick random horizontal kick in pixels; the peg deflections that build the spread.

running.description: When true the tick integrates; toggle to start/pause the drop.

shapes.description: Triangular grid of 15 static peg markers the balls deflect around as they fall.

width.description: Simulation width in pixels; bounds the horizontal walk.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Points
overridableConfigKeys.description: ~250 samples uniform in the [-5,5] square; red points fall inside the inscribed radius-5 circle, blue outside — the red fraction ≈ π/4.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick re-scatters every point uniformly in the [-5,5] square and recolors it; toggle to start/pause.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-probability / MonteCarloOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Points
overridableConfigKeys.description: 24 walkers all seeded at the origin; the widening cloud IS the visual — one red walker tracks a single trajectory.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick random-walks every walker; toggle to start/pause the diffusion.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Step
overridableConfigKeys.description: Half-width of each per-tick random displacement in data units; larger diffuses faster.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-probability / RandomWalkOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.
